note: rendered from the sandbox via the public pollinations endpoint to test second-tier prompt behavior; production renders use render-fipo-posters.yml (gpt-image-1). Prompt shown is v2; the test render used v1 (pre-glyph-guardrail).

causal.label: the footage came first
causal.blurb: an import, an abandoned production, a nature documentary — wrapped in new material and a new plot

distance.label: recognizably descended
distance.blurb: the lineage is visible to anyone who has seen a movie

novum.premise: a household robot learns love from daytime television and applies it incorrectly
novum.short: the robot learned love from television

dramatis.hero: a mall Santa with a secret

commitment.text: All computers are walls of blinking lights and reel-to-reel tape, even the pocket ones.

era.label: the Cannon / VHS-box decade
era.anxiety: nukes again, but really: Star Wars money

milieu.label: a Filipino co-production
milieu.blurb: Manila stands in for everywhere; the stunt team is fearless and uninsured

budget.label: pretend-blockbuster
budget.blurb: the trailer cost more than the picture

comps.line: Ghostbusters meets A Charlie Brown Christmas — in a shopping mall.

genome.tagline: They took his world. Now he’s taking it back.
genome.logline: A mall Santa with a secret must outlast the plants when a household robot learns love from daytime television and applies it incorrectly — or the galaxy goes quiet.

failures.label: scale misjudgment
failures.reason: The fate of the galaxy will be decided in a shopping mall.

failures.label: miscasting
failures.reason: A supermodel between campaigns as a mall Santa with a secret: the casting call is the special effect.

failures.label: failed transcription
failures.reason: It has seen Ghostbusters, and remembers it fondly, incorrectly. What got lost: the budget.

failures.label: trope collision
failures.reason: Ghostbusters meets A Charlie Brown Christmas — in a shopping mall. The collision is the content.

failures.label: footage seam
failures.reason: Two films are visible at all times, like a double exposure.

brief.text: a household robot holding a television close, heart-shaped camera eyes in a shopping mall concourse, with writhing vegetation

composition.text: Composition: the hero carrying the unconscious heroine, explosions and writhing vegetation behind them

medium.text: A 1986 Filipino science fiction film poster, photochemical one-sheet, airbrushed gouache on board, rich saturated color, painted lens flare

flaws.text: the monster’s size relative to the helicopter beside it is ambiguous

projection.prompt:
A 1986 Filipino science fiction film poster, photochemical one-sheet, airbrushed gouache on board, rich saturated color, painted lens flare.
Composition: the hero carrying the unconscious heroine, explosions and writhing vegetation behind them.
Subject: a household robot holding a television close, heart-shaped camera eyes in a shopping mall concourse, with writhing vegetation.
Painted details: the monster’s size relative to the helicopter beside it is ambiguous.
Rich saturated color. The top and bottom fifths of the painting stay simple, dark, and uncluttered — space reserved for lettering. No text, no lettering, no logo, no signature, no glyphs, no letterforms of any kind.
Painted entirely by hand in the period style; not a photograph, not a digital montage.

typography.title: Love Bot: The Homecoming
typography.tagline: They took his world. Now he’s taking it back.

renderedPrompt:
A 1986 Filipino science fiction film poster, photochemical one-sheet, airbrushed gouache on board, rich saturated color, painted lens flare.
Composition: the hero carrying the unconscious heroine, explosions and writhing vegetation behind them.
Subject: a household robot holding a television close, heart-shaped camera eyes in a shopping mall concourse, with writhing vegetation.
Painted details: the monster’s size relative to the helicopter beside it is ambiguous.
Rich saturated color, space reserved at the top and bottom for lettering. No text, no lettering, no logo.
Painted entirely by hand in the period style; not a photograph, not a digital montage.
